result.stdout:
Description:
  Adds content includes inline or via props file, and optionally imports props into a .csproj

Usage:
  add-content [options]

Options:
  -p, --project <project>  Path to a .csproj file or a directory containing one
  -f, --file <file>        Path to the .props file
  -i, --include <include>  Glob or file pattern to include
  -o, --overwrite          If set, overwrites the props file instead of appending
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information
